name: synapse
description: Claude Code integration for Synapse memory: pushes session transcripts to your Synapse (ingest), two-way-syncs your skills library, mirrors opted-in config files for the dream lane, and wires up the recall/remember MCP tools. Point it at a local or central Synapse.

SYNAPSE_URL.title: Synapse URL
SYNAPSE_URL.description: Base URL of your Synapse server (no path), e.g. https://synapse.example.net or http://localhost:8765

SYNAPSE_INGEST_TOKEN.title: Machine token
SYNAPSE_INGEST_TOKEN.description: Bearer token if your Synapse is auth-gated. Leave blank for an open/local server, or run `! synapse-login` in the Claude prompt to fetch it.

SYNAPSE_CONFIG_SYNC.title: Mirror config files
SYNAPSE_CONFIG_SYNC.description: Opt-in: mirror your config into Synapse for the dream lane. OFF by default — your CLAUDE.md + rules/*.md stay on this machine unless you set this to 1, which auto-grabs them from ~/.claude and the current project's .claude.

SYNAPSE_CONFIG_PATHS.title: Extra config globs
SYNAPSE_CONFIG_PATHS.description: Optional EXTRA globs (relative to ~/.claude) to mirror beyond the auto-discovered CLAUDE.md + rules/*.md, e.g. "output-styles/*.md".
